text:
The Japanese objections etc have a really high pitch behind them that the other languages don't have.

Franziska seems to sound the same in every language except Japanese.

Manfred's "Einspruch!" sounds like the actor was faking a deep voice.

Payne's objections etc are all very high-pitched.

Kristoph's "Einspruch!" sounds more like "Einspruch." and appears to be spoken in a stern way rather than calm or accusing.

text:
"Toma ya" sounds so fucking stupid in spanish..

Spain ruins everything it dubs.

"Take that" translates to "toma", or "toma eso" in Spanish, but they decided to go with "Toma ya" which translates to "Take it now" in english.

Yes, it sounds that stupid to us.

text:
I speak Spanish an I feel just the same as you with the German dub. I've played all the games in English and the Spanish dub just sounds wrong.

But also, after watching a let's play of the Spanish game, just realized that the translation kills some puns, not only in the names of characters (they only seem to have localized  Sawhit because Phoenix calls him Mr. Didit and the Corrida lastname because it's an eufemism for masturbation). For example, White calls Wright "Bright", instead of "Wrong". Also, the song and movie quote references sound weird translated.
